description: Create a content slide on private equity fundraising competition with a two-column layout featuring a donut chart and summary bullet points.

header.headline: Half of the PE professionals (50%) expect no change in the level of competition for fundraising
header.sub: Expected level of competition for fundraising – 2019 vs. 2018 [%]

segments.label: I expect the competitive situation to intensify
I don’t expect any change in the competitive situation
I expect the competitive situation to ease up

right.title: "What degree of competitiveness do you expect in fundraising in 2019?"

items.text: 50% of respondents anticipate no change in the competition for funds in 2019 compared to the current status quo
Compared to 2018, more PE professionals expect a more intense competitive situation, an increase of 9 ppt. from 34% in 2018 to 43% in 2019
An easing in the competitive situation is anticipated by only 7% of respondents, up from 4% last year
